reviews.review_title: No content, no way to contact anyone
reviews.review_description: The app is literally dead… zero responses from anyone from the company in several months. No updates about ANYTHING regarding this app. It was great while it lasted, but it seemingly just does not exist anymore. Total waste of a purchase for me as this was the only reason I bought a Meta Quest VR headset in the first place. Has anyone else received a single response from anyone at Xtadium in the last year?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're sorry to hear that you've felt disconnected from the app and our updates.

We understand how frustrating it can be when the content you're looking for isn't available or when communication doesn't meet expectations. We're continuing to improve the Xtadium experience and will share future updates through the app and our official channels.

We appreciate your feedback and your support of Xtadium.

reviews.review_title: One of the reasons I bought meta Quest 3
reviews.review_description: I would love to watch the NBA UFC NFL MLB in the stadium. There has not been a live event since I bought these thats why you get a 3 you would get a 5 plus if...and if there has been there is nothing to tell me when it is going on. I dont watch Nascar but still be cool to watch it at the track on my headset. Also can you post when the next event you will show will be or can I get a text or even an email or reminder somehow on the next events with dates and times.

Okay, sure, it doesn’t do live games but if you don’t want to pay for a subscription, it’s the best option in my opinion, and you get the best view of all these sports, especially UFC. Although they're not caught up with ufc

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words and for being part of the Xtadium community. We're glad you're enjoying the experience and the unique perspectives our content offers.

We're always working to improve the platform, and feedback like yours helps us understand what fans enjoy most.

Thanks for your support, and we appreciate you taking the time to leave a review.

reviews.review_title: PLEASE BRING BACK THE GAMES TO WATCH
reviews.review_description: I love this app, but I I can’t seem to find the games anymore. I love watching the NBA in WNBA, but I can’t seem to find where I can watch them anymore. When I click into my league pass, it takes me to another area where I can only see highlights, but not the actual live. I also feel that as a league pass subscriber I should have the option to watch any game courtside view, and as far as the private VIP room there should be an option to invite friends and have a watch party to watch games and events.￼

Watched it no problem in 2025. 
This year?! “Oh just go into the app and click on TNT Sports….”
It’s not there!!!! Fkn POS app!

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry for the frustration. We know it’s disappointing when content you enjoyed in a previous season isn’t available in the current lineup.

Content availability can change over time, and we’ll share any future updates through the app and our official channels.

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback.

reviews.review_description: Bring it back please
Why no more hockey streaming? I don’t see any cameras in the Stanley Cup with the team. I’m watching right now nowhere on the walls anywhere so why remove it?
Will hockey or tnt come back for this app I need to watch finals in vr

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback. We know many fans are eager for more live sports content in VR. We're always working to expand the experiences available on Xtadium and will share any future content updates through the app and our official channels.

Thanks for being part of the community.

reviews.review_description:
This was the best app for watching nba games court side in vr! Now it’s gone! I would gladly pay to watch games if it came down to money. I think this is a huge opportunity for both this app and the NBA and I don’t understand why people are so behind the times. It just makes no sense. 

This app has become pointless unless 

1. You like watching sports nobody cares about
2. You like watching the same boring highlights over and over

Not worth downloading

developer_response.body: Thanks for your message. We are waiting for the official word and will update everyone once as soon as we can. Thanks

reviews.review_description:
They promised football and we've gotten nothing. You'd think they'd jump at the option considering Sky Worlds has shut down. All they have are mickey mouse sports, no mark fighters, and 8th tier basketball games.

Don't bother.

Bring back the games! What a cool feature that is now seemingly gone. They keep saying they’re waiting for “official word”. How about you give the people what they want: NBA games in courtside vr! Bring it back!

reviews.review_title: Removing NBA VR Content Breaks the Entir
reviews.review_description:
Taking away live basketball games is a terrible decision and completely undermines why many of us downloaded and supported this platform in the first place. NBA VR was the flagship experience the one thing that made this app stand out from watching sports on a regular TV.

VR is about immersion. Courtside views, the feeling of being in the arena, and watching games with friends is what justified using a headset at all. Without live basketball, this app is reduced to highlights and generic content that can be found anywhere else.

Many users bought Meta Quest headsets specifically because NBA VR was promoted as a core feature. Removing it without a clear replacement or roadmap feels like a bait-and-switch and erodes trust in the platform.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We understand why this is frustrating and we appreciate you taking the time to let us know how you feel.

At the moment, we are still waiting for official updates. When there is confirmed information to share, we will update everyone.

Thank you for being part of the Xtadium community.

reviews.review_description: Ive been checking one and off for like 5 months and there is nothing new in the main screen. Please update. This was so cool when active.

I purchased the Meta 3 for the sole purpose of getting Xtadium and watching NBA games courtside. Now I keep reading you're waiting for official updates. It's unrealistic to expect users to believe there is no word at all on what's going to happen. And leaving users in limbo is unfair

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing how you’re feeling. We understand how frustrating it is not to have clarity, especially when immersive NBA experiences were a big part of what excited many users about Xtadium.

At the moment, we don’t have any news or details to share regarding immersive NBA games. Availability depends on factors outside the app, and we’re not able to provide updates until there is confirmed information.

As soon as there’s official news to communicate, we’ll make sure to share it. We appreciate your patience and your continued interest in Xtadium.

reviews.review_description: Watching some of the highlights is very immersive but kinda gets old fast with the lack of live content. Or even full game replays. I am hoping there is plans in the future to be able to watch full hockey games and nascar races. Even if they aren't live.
This makes me angry. I wanted to watch ufc 326 with my long distance buddy now I can’t. Please add live ufc I would be very happy

I understand that you guys are waiting for “official updates” on NBA games returning to this app for immersive VR viewing.  But that’s confusing because the NBA AI bot on their website says that the games are already up on the app for the ‘25-‘26 season.  Is it an admin issue on your end?

developer_response.body:
Hi Damien, thank you for your message. Information shown on external websites or platforms does not always reflect availability within Xtadium. At this time, immersive NBA content is not enabled in the app, and we are still waiting for official confirmation regarding VR access. This is not an admin or technical issue on our end.

Once there is confirmed information to share, we will communicate it directly through the app.

Thanks for your patience and for taking the time to reach out.

reviews.review_description: Don’t bother downloading the app. There have been no updates since last year. No new NBA games, No new Australian Open, No new Imersive videos. I bought the Quest for this app and it turn out to be abandoned. Don’t waste your time with it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your feedback. We understand why it can feel frustrating not to see the content you were expecting, especially if you’ve been checking back after some time.

Xtadium is still active, and the app continues to evolve, but availability of specific events and leagues depends on external factors. At the moment, we don’t have any news or details to share, but we are working on bringing more content.

When there is confirmed information to communicate, it will be shared through the app. We appreciate you taking the time to leave a review and share your perspective.

reviews.review_description: So when does this app plan on being updated and will the WNBA section also be updated?
No live NBA games. I’m sure that “official word” we’re waiting on will come any day now…right?? This all is nothing but a waste of storage space…deleting until you bring back live NBA games.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your feedback. We understand how frustrating it is not to see live NBA games available, especially if that was a key reason you downloaded the app.

At the moment, immersive NBA content is not enabled in Xtadium, and we don’t have any confirmed updates to share. Availability depends on external approvals, and when there is official information, it will be communicated directly through the app.

We appreciate you taking the time to voice your concerns and understand your decision. We’ll continue working to bring new content and experiences to the platform when possible.

reviews.review_title: No Answers for NBA VR Schedule
reviews.review_description: One of my main reasons for purchasing this device was watching NBA games. Was told games would be available by December and nothing. Are there any updates on this feature?

developer_response.body: Hi There, Thank you for reaching out! We're waiting on the official word. We'll update everyone as soon as we can. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Loved this app last year for nba games it’s not showing current games is my app not working or you no longer do nba games? Anyone else having a problem

developer_response.body: Hi Earl! Thanks for reaching out. Nothing announced yet, we're waiting on the official word. We'll update everyone as soon as we can. Thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description: Nothing to see here..
One of the only reasons I bought the VR was to watch games courtside .. now we all can’t

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. At the moment, we are still waiting for official updates. When there is confirmed information to share, we will update everyone.

Thank you for being part of the Xtadium community.

reviews.review_description: bro i farted
No more NBA games? That was such a great thing. Bring it back or your app is useless.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your message. We understand how disappointing it is not to see NBA content available right now. At the moment, immersive NBA games are not enabled in Xtadium, and we don’t have any confirmed updates to share.

When there is official information available, we’ll communicate it through the app. Thanks for taking the time to share your feedback.

reviews.review_description: I don’t get why none of the live games on NBA or espn or anything are showing up

developer_response.body: Hi Mike, Thanks for reaching out. We will update the Xtadium community soon with updates.

reviews.review_description: Watched some NHL playoff games and had a wonderful time but d rather choose where to sit and be in n one spot and enjoy the game. Bouncing around is disorienting and not enjoyable for me. I had a center ice view and it was ideal. Suddenly I am behind the goaltender and 3 seconds later I am on the blue line, not fun let me sit and enjoy the game!!! Experienced hockey viewers will appreciate this view.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for sharing your experience and we’re glad to hear you enjoyed watching the NHL playoff games in VR!
 
We completely understand your preference for staying in one fixed seat. The camera angles for those specific NHL games were produced externally. Because of that, we didn’t have control over the camera changes or angle switching in that particular stream.
 
That said, your feedback is really valuable, and we’ll definitely keep it in mind for future opportunities where we have more control over the production setup.
 
Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts, it really helps us improve the experience for everyone.

reviews.review_description:
It won’t
Let me uninstall

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you’re running into this issue. Xtadium is safe to use and this sounds like a technical problem that we can help you fix. Please email us at support@xtadium.com with your headset model and we’ll guide you through the steps to get everything working normally again.

reviews.review_description: Will any football games will available to watch in immersive VR this season?

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your question! You can check out the ESPN and FOX Sports rooms in Xtadium, where you’ll find immersive highlights and featured content from this season and previous ones.

We’re also continually working on expanding our content offering and bringing more immersive experiences to the app whenever possible.

Thanks for being part of the Xtadium community!

reviews.review_title: Is this app supposed to be empty?
reviews.review_description: When I go to the app there is nothing. Just my room there no display besides the bottom one that doesn’t let me do anything. No upcoming or anything
its a good app

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much, we really appreciate the kind words! 🙌
Glad to hear you’re enjoying Xtadium, and we’re excited to keep bringing you more great experiences.

reviews.review_description: Ufc in 3d vr would be great.  this is no different than tv

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. Immersive VR requires dedicated production workflows, specialized camera setups, and specific content rights, so it isn’t feasible for every event.

That said, we do offer fully immersive VR experiences through our partners, which you can find directly in the app. We’re continuing to expand the range of events and formats available as opportunities allow.

We appreciate your input and your interest in more immersive experiences in Xtadium.

reviews.review_description:
Update 6/14/25:

Game 3 started off terrible in the 1st with distorted motion blur making it absolutely unwatchable.  I restarted the headset multiple times and it didn't really improve anything.  But by periods 2 and 3 it seems the issues had resolved and it was much better.

Didn't watch much of game 4 but things were working decent.  Game 5 has been good so far.  Upping my review to 4 stars because this could be so d-mn cool once they figure it all out.  

Feedback: 
Video needs to be 3d 180 instead of 2d and that will be an absolute game changer.  
I love the TV feed at the top of the screen.  Part of game 5 didn't have that and I instantly missed it.  Too many of the angles make it impossible to see what's going on so being able to look up makes a huge difference.
The cameras behind the net should be about 5 ft higher.  It's the most difficult angle to see what's going on unless the puck ends up in the back of the net.
Probably a physics issue but the cameras mounted to the glass shake too much when players bump into the boards.  It quickly makes the viewer woosy when it shakes so much.
A better interface would be great in game.  No real options to even pause the feed.  I usually have to exit to the lobby and go back in.  And too often the interface pops up for no reason and I have to keep clicking buttons until it disappears.
Ultimately it would be amazing to be able to switch the cameras myself.  There could be the automatic one controlled by the app, but then let the users switch between the 5 (or possibly more down the line).  This level of control would make this an absolute must watch experience in sports.  
TLDR: Very cool but needs some work

Original review: Tried to watch the NHL Final game.  Just sat in a lobby and waited for the menu to load.  Restarted it a couple of times but no luck.  It worked OK a few days ago for the hockey game, although it froze a lot and had distorted frames quite often.  Maybe someday they'll get it right.

developer_response.body: We are so sorry about your experience. We are working on the issue you reported. We do invite you to watch the upcoming matches as by then the issue should be solved. If you experience anything you don't like, please contact us at support@xtadiumvr.com

reviews.review_description: I was blown away by the Stanley Cup Final coverage in VR! Camera cuts were a bit jarring at first, but once I understood the flow of how the cameras followed the action, they became more natural. You got to feel the action behind the net, over center ice, and along the boards. It was sick!

Last night I used it for the first time to watch Game 4 of Oilers vs Panthers Stanley Cup Final. I was absolutely blown away!!! When it first started I had a lot of lag time, but I remained patient and eventually if streamed perfectly the remainder of the game. The experience is like nothing I've ever seen on my Meta Quest 3. The action was right in your face. You can tell the real-life audience was rattling the glass because the camera moves! You are in the action. And the overlay of the TNT telecast was brilliant! I love being able to see the real arena while listening to play-by-play. When the broadcast goes to commercial, you are just a regular member in the audience. I love it. Also, the seat right behind the goalie is intense! You see puck on net every time. Incredible. I can't wait to use this for more live games and more sports.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the amazing review!! We are working to bring more games and more sports!

reviews.review_description:
Hoping for additional games.  When I asked why there are no Indiana Fever games on Xtadium someone responded quickly and said they would try to get a game added.

Edit:
No Fever games the entire season?! Seems odd.  4 other teams have at least 5 games this season.

Only tried this last night. Was hoping to watch the WNBA games at home in Texas while my daughter is at the games in NY. We'll to only have so few live games on the quest kinda is a let down. If live to see more games to actually use this more.

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying Xtadium! We know it’d be great to watch more live WNBA games—especially with your daughter at the matches. While our current live schedule is limited, we’re working to bring more events your way. In the meantime, we hope you enjoy our replays, highlights, and other live sports.

reviews.review_description: I’ve watched NBA Courtside, followed Copa América from the sidelines, and experienced the Stanley Cup Finals right behind the glass — all from my couch. With Xtadium’s immersive tech, it genuinely feels like you’re in the arena, front row and center. Whether it’s UFC, IndyCar, Australian Open, X-Games, or more — Xtadium brings the action to you like never before.

developer_response.body:
Hello Chriiss1997!
Wow! What an amazing review! We’re thrilled you’ve been courtside, rinkside, and trackside with Xtadium. Thanks for sharing your experience, and we can’t wait to bring you even more front-row action!

reviews.review_description: Try to watch any media and it says it can’t connect to servers and to contact servers. Not sure what to do, it works fine on my quest 2.

developer_response.body:
Hi there!

We’re really sorry you ran into this issue. Our team has just released a new update for the app that should resolve the issue. Please give the update a try and let us know how it goes!

Thanks so much,
The Xtadium Team

reviews.review_description: As an NHL and Colorado Avalanche fan, this was the perfect way to watch a game! The Avalanche vs Stars game was awesome because I was able to see Nathan MacKinnon’s Gold Stick presentation as if I were there. Absolutely blown away and can’t wait to see more NHL games in the future! (Hopefully Avalanche games 😎)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your fantastic feedback! We're thrilled you enjoyed the game in VR. It's amazing to hear our app made you feel like you were right there! We're working on bringing you more NHL games so stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Great Solo, Cant Watch with friends
reviews.review_description:
bugs where audio doesnt work for you and someone else in the same party viewing. cant use meta voice chat with the viewing either. 

bugs with voice chat joining someone and not being able to see the game too.

developer_response.body:
Hey!
Sorry for that. Our team will look into it to provide a solution.

reviews.review_description: I watched the stanley cup game and as a sports fan it was AWESOME

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review! It's great to know you loved it!
Remember you can watch all the games from this year's final and the full replays in VR!

reviews.review_description: Absolutely crazy. This is one of my favorite things I’ve found on vr. It feels like you’re really there watching the game in real time. The one thing we need is more NHL. I love hockey and I watched the stars vs avs game and it was great. I would be so thankful for more NHL streams.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the amazing feedback and apologies for the delay in replying! We’re really glad to hear the experience made you feel like you were right there at the game.

We hear you on wanting more NHL content. We’re constantly working to bring more high-quality sports content to Xtadium whenever possible.

Thanks again for the support, and we hope you’ll check out what’s new in the latest version.

reviews.review_description:
One of the best experiences I've had in entertainment -  it was unbelievable to watch a hockey game live with my Dad. Giving him high 5's and chatting throughout the game was incredible, it felt like we were there. 

Are there flaws? Of course, but I appreciate the hard work of the developers and hope they get the funding to do more events. Sometimes when we logged in, we had to hold down a button to hear or talk, which was annoying. But then I logged out at intermission for a break, and it was perfect when I accessed the app again. My dad had problems where he'd see one out of every 5 seconds, but he restarted his headset and it worked. These glitches are expected with anything new.  

Keep up the great work, and please get more Colorado Avalanche games on 🙏

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience! We're thrilled to hear you and your dad enjoyed the game together. Your understanding and patience with our process mean a lot to us. We're working hard to improve and will do our best to bring more Colorado Avalanche games to the app. Thanks for your support!

reviews.review_description:
Immersive means using VR technology to experience being fully involved in a simulated environment. Xtadium falls extremely short of providing this experience.

This app has too many view changes to enjoy NBA games. We need the ability to watch games from our desired views. Also, there is an option to use a mic and that is useless when we can’t record clips with our reactions. Currently, watching NBA games on TV is best.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for your suggestions, we'll take them into account for upcoming games. As for the mic, remember you can have watch parties with friends! You can use it there. Also, the recording functionality is turned off because of our partner's preference, not a problem with the App.

reviews.review_description: The Xstadium Way to watch games in VR is incredible! I watched a full nba game in the courtside mode afterwards I felt like I went to the game and now have to drive home! The app updates with avatars and more stat updates is incredible! Thanks team keep this up it’s the future

developer_response.body: That's exactly our goal! We'll keep bringing more content so you can sit courtside on multiple games without having to leave home!!

reviews.review_description: Genuinely the buggiest app I've ever used, not a single thing works well. Genuinely not a thing, the streaming is always choppy, and I have fantastic internet that can playback 8K 60fps video. Windows often get stuck and aren't able to be moved and require a restart. Windows will frequently teleport around your house. Your hands will always be constantly tracked so you can relax them.  You'll try to watch another game in multi-game mode and it won't switch at all. Logging into my NBA account bricked my headset TWICE and required me to factory reset my headset TWICE. I genuinely cannot believe how horrible this app is.

developer_response.body: Hi! We are surprised and sorry about your experience. Please get in touch with us at support@xtadiumvr.com and tell us about your issues. Also, please send us your device ID so we can have more information and help you resolve the issue.

reviews.review_description: As an NHL fan watching the Stars vs Avalanche was simply amazing. You can see the game like never before!! This is the only way I want to watch the NHL! I'm not a huge soccer fan, but watching the PSG game is making me into one. immersive is the only way I want to watch.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're thrilled you enjoyed the game and found it so immersive! It's great to hear our app is changing how you watch sports, even sparking an interest in soccer with the PSG game!

reviews.review_description: I got this app assuming it would have things like a  mlb and nba assoc and it’s just not but Facebook will randomly have games on that make me feel like it could be great one day so I’m putting five stars for the dream of what this could be someday

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the five stars and for believing in what Xtadium can become! We really appreciate it. Since that version, the app has continued to grow with new partners, features, and immersive experiences. Content availability depends on production setups and rights from each partner, but we’re always working to expand what we can offer.

Thanks again for the support and we hope you’ll check out the latest version to see what’s new.

reviews.review_title: TheThey have to improve a lot of things!
reviews.review_description: First of all, the ability to sit in any position you want in the stadium, it's really uncomfortable to turn your head every second. The poor video quality has to improve. In a world of 4k, 360p quality is unbearable. Also the lack of European football and basketball games, in addition to the fact that you need a VPN if you're not in the US.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for sharing this feedback, and apologies for the late reply. Since that version, we’ve continued improving Xtadium with new partners, updated production workflows, and expanded immersive experiences. Availability and camera options depend on each partner’s setup, but we’re always working to enhance quality where possible.

We appreciate your input and hope you’ll check out what’s new in the latest version.

reviews.review_description:
Lots of potential here. Just not any content other than select NBA games. 

Needs to be available for all sports broadcasts . Then it’d be 5 stars.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback!

While we currently feature select NBA games, there’s actually a lot more available, including UFC, WNBA, NASCAR, PSG, and more. We’re constantly expanding our lineup, so definitely stay tuned!

For the latest on available content and upcoming live events, be sure to check our website regularly.

reviews.review_description: I love the current content that it's available for a live streaming and I can't wait to see how much more can be added to the platform.

developer_response.body: It's great to know you love it!! We are working to bring much more!

reviews.review_title: Great UI. But video quality is lacking.
reviews.review_description: I remember years ago an app like NextVR had actual 3D while also being better quality. How you can only display 2D at worse quality, so many years later is highly missing here.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback — we really appreciate you taking the time to share it.

We’re constantly working to improve the video experience in Xtadium, and we’d love to learn more about the quality issues you’re seeing. If you don’t mind, please reach out to us at support@xtadiumvr.com with more details. That way, our team can take a closer look and work on making things better.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

reviews.review_description: This should be the future of spectating a game that’s not in person. Once it gets full 3D and 8k minimum, I wouldn’t watch any other way.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the great feedback and apologies for the delay in replying! We love hearing that Xtadium feels like the future of watching games. Really appreciate you sharing your thoughts, and we hope you’ll check out what’s new in the latest version.

reviews.review_description: The views these games show are amazing!!! It truly feels like you are sitting right next to the players or in front row seats.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words, and apologies for the delay in replying! We’re really glad to hear you enjoyed the front row feeling. This is exactly what we aim for. Xtadium has continued to improve since then, and we hope you’ll check out what’s new in the latest version.

reviews.review_description: Love the concept, but the content is limited and live events are either non-existent or garbage. Someone else please step up and fill this void.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that our content and live events didn't meet your expectations. We're constantly working to improve and expand our offerings. Your input is valuable, and we'll strive to fill the void and provide a better experience. We do have Live content every day from NBA League Pass, plus immersive NBA games, NASCAR all Sundays, NCAA, Indycar and more!

reviews.review_description: I just literally watched game 6 of the Stanley cup finals from the best seats in the house and it was pretty incredible. I imagine people with limited internet connections would give a negative review otherwise this is amazing!

The camera views from have some bad views of the race you couldn't see the start finsh line an you were above the starter an the camera selection did not keep up with the race I just watched the race on TV

developer_response.body: We are sorry for your experience. We are taking into account your feedback for upcoming Live events. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: The app is insanely slow to do anything at all - it takes literal minutes to even load up the buttons to select content and then if you actually try to click on something to watch prepare to wait another 30 minutes. Just watch paint dry instead, do not download this garbage.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jordan,
We are sorry that you experienced this. Our app requires a pretty good connection and if you don't have it, the experience can't run smoothly.

reviews.review_description: It was decent when i first got the app but after about 5 minutes of downloading, there was no option to click on anything. I uninstalled and reinstalled. Nothing. Horrible app that has 360p quality and now I can’t even watch anything. Fix your app devs

developer_response.body:
Sorry for this experience. Our devs are currently working on improving the performance. Thanks for reporting the issue, we are on it. 
We do invite you to come back and check the upcoming games as the issue should be solved by then. If you do notice something else you don't like, don't doubt to contact us at support@xtadiumvr.com

reviews.review_title: Wow! This will be the future
reviews.review_description: I just saw the future of sports entertainment… no doubt!. Amazing feeling, almost like being on the actual stadium watching the game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're thrilled you had such an immersive experience. Your excitement motivates us to keep bringing features and sports! Stay tuned for more!

reviews.review_description: I’m giving this app a 3 star because I feel it should have more immersive live videos because I feel that’s what I paid for. To rise above all apps I think if u have a live immersive game possible more times out the week it would be better I can go to YouTube to watch highlights just saying..Please take a look into that.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the feedback and apologies for the delay in replying. Since that version, Xtadium has expanded with new partners and immersive events throughout the year. Live VR coverage depends on production setups and content rights from each partner, so availability can vary, but we’re always working to bring more high-quality immersive experiences to the app.

We appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts, and we hope you’ll check out what’s new in the latest version.

reviews.review_description: It is an amazing app. The only think I would change is to add more games highlights.

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks for your comment. We'll keep that in mind!

reviews.review_description: Love the nba courtside

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words and apologies for the late reply! We’re really glad you enjoyed the courtside experience. Xtadium has continued to evolve with new improvements and partners, so we hope you’ll check out the latest version to see what’s new.

reviews.review_description: Definitely worth trying but it would be better if we got to choose which angles we wanted to watch the games from instead of it switching back and forth simultaneously from behind the rim to courtside without warning, since it's kinda hard to keep track of the player with the ball because sometimes the refs/coaches get in the way of the camera. Plus being at crotch level whenever you're court side doesn't help either so it would be better if we were just a bit higher. other than that, there's nothing i'd change. keep up the good work 👍🏽

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your feedback, it is very valuable for us. We have the option of allowing the user to change cameras in other sports rooms. Nevertheless, we will consider your feedback for improvements of the immersive Live transmission of the NBA games.

reviews.review_description: I gave this 3 stars and almost 4 because the basketball game I watched from sideline and baseline was INCREDIBLE! So was hockey! However..would love to see more of this. Also there are mainly just dated highlights. The ESPN link shows ncaa rankings from 2022-2023 season (It’s now February 2024). I do watch my nba season pass on it…and while it looks good……that sideline/baseline view has spoiled me!

developer_response.body: Hi! We are always working on bringing more content to the App. This weekend, for example, we'll have Live NBA All-Star from the sideline! We hope you enjoy it and can give us the 4th star :D (Or 5th)

reviews.review_description: I was pretty hyped to get on this and watch some  cool stuff but 99% of the content is just 4 minute highlight videos. They have a serious lack of content.

developer_response.body:
Hey!
Most of those highlights are from content we had live! Remember to tune in to the upcoming NHL Stanley Cup Final matches live and for free. We also have WNBA, ONE Championship and more!

reviews.review_description: I assume the apps servers a really bad because it can’t play 5 seconds LIVE for me without stopping for 3 seconds and then starting again. Over and over. Impossible to watch anything. But that also goes for any previously shown content on the app. Just won’t play at all. Sadly this is why I bought my VR. lol

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for your feedback, we are working on what you are commenting.

reviews.review_description: Had and issue after an update but it was quickly resolved.  Enjoying watching games once again.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the inconvenience. This shouldn't happen anymore. Please try again. If you have any issue please contact us at support@xtadiumvr.com

reviews.review_description: First off wow! I watched an NHL game for the first time and as a hockey fan I don’t know how I can go back to watching it just on a tv. The graphics for what’s available in the quest 3 are almost so real I find myself standing and cheering with the crowd! I see some people talking about buggy connections and my advice is first off have good internet and second understand how early alot of this stuff is and just know this is a great step in an unbelievable direction for sports fans

developer_response.body: This is great!! Thanks for your review! We'll keep bringing immersive content for all sports fans to enjoy.

reviews.review_description:
I average between 650mbps and 700mbps down and 23mpbs up. I have my own router with excellent 5G connection. I'm literally sitting 5 feet from my router. Yet I can't get through 2 minutes without being disconnected sayin internet is no longer detected. It won't even reconnect I have to restart the app completely. I tried about 6-7 times before I gave up.

Don't waste your time.

developer_response.body:
Hi!
We are sorry you had such an experience. Our team is working on solving the issue you commented. This week, we will have a new update that should solve your issue.
Thanks,
Xtadium team

reviews.review_description: I was watching an NBA game. Then all of a sudden, the app claims that I'm not connected to the internet when I try to quit the app and restart it. It doesn't work when I try to uninstall the app and re install it. It doesn't work unbelievable and totally unacceptable!!!!! I would give zero stars if I could

developer_response.body:
Hi!
We are so sorry you had this experience. The team has worked on a new update of the App that has just been uploaded and should solve this issue. Please update the App and try again.
Best regards,
Xtadium team

reviews.review_description: Couldn’t wait to use this app. One of the biggest reasons to get the Meta Quest. Was able to watch videos up until the first day of the NBA season then the app tells me I’m not connected to internet when everything else works just fine, Horizon Feed, Store, YouTube, everything connects to internet except the Xtadium app. Then only option is to quit. Uninstalled and reinstalled numerous times even factory reset everything. Same outcome, Oops, not connected……..frustrating to say the least and leads to a big letdown.

developer_response.body:
Hi!
We are so sorry you had this experience. The team has worked on a new update of the App that has just been uploaded and should solve this issue. Please update the App and try again.
Best regards,
Xtadium team

reviews.review_description: Yo I love this app it's cool to watch live NBA games on VR every once in a while with friends.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review!! Xtadium loves you too!

reviews.review_description: When you sign up, they offer a NBA league pass voucher. When trying to use the voucher code it says it’s been used already. My guess is internal employees are selling the vouchers on the side. Escalated and they said there’s nothing they could do. I’ll tell you what they can do, they could provide a working code. That simple. If they don’t get their customer service together, I don’t see them surviving too much longer.

developer_response.body:
Dear TheGsszrg,

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and frustration you've experienced with the NBA league pass voucher promotion. We understand how disappointing it can be to encounter issues with a promised offer.

Unfortunately, it appears there was a misunderstanding regarding the promotion's terms and the availability of the voucher codes. We want to clarify that the promotion had a limited-time availability, and it seems you may have missed the sign-up window, which led to the code appearing as already used.

While we regret that we cannot provide a new code at this time, we assure you that there is no internal selling of vouchers by our employees. We take such allegations seriously and maintain strict ethical standards within our team.

We value your feedback and understand the importance of customer service. Rest assured, we are taking steps to improve our communication and ensure a better user experience moving forward. We hope to have more promotions in the future, and we would love the opportunity to make it up to you.

Again, we apologize for any confusion or inconvenience this may have caused. Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we appreciate the opportunity to address your concerns.

Warm regards,

Xtadium Team

reviews.review_description: I only see a black screen. Then bunch of circles but still a black screen. How do i even use this app if thats the case??

developer_response.body:
Hi Chazingg, 

We're truly sorry to hear about the trouble you encountered with our app. Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We understand how frustrating it must have been to encounter a black screen upon launching the app.

We've investigated the issue, and we're pleased to inform you that it has been resolved in the latest update of our app. To enjoy our app without any further interruptions, we kindly ask you to update the app to the latest version available and restart it. You should no longer experience the black screen issue once you've completed these steps.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused you and appreciate your patience and understanding. If you have any further questions or encounter any other issues, please don't hesitate to reach out to our support team at support@xtadiumvr.com. We're here to help and ensure that your experience with our app is nothing short of excellent.

Thank you, 
Xtadium Team

reviews.review_title: Cant login with YouTube TV league pass.
reviews.review_description:
Have League pass through YouTube TV and it says my account is invalid. It works on the NBA app so frustrating it’s not working here.
Edit: updating my review to 4 stars because the 52 live games are free without league pass and it is a great experience. Still wish my YouTube TV leaguepass worked for the multi game experience.

reviews.review_title: Need option to turn off commentary
reviews.review_description: The immersive experience watching an NBA game is ruined by the nonstop chatter that has nothing to do with the game. You need to add an option to turn off the commentary and just allow the sounds of the game. Also eliminate the shots from the nosebleed seats — the video is low-rez so the players are just fuzzy blurs. Stick with the courtside views.

developer_response.body: Hi Davepiano88, thank you for your feedback. We have now given users the ability to mute the commentators and just listen to the noise in the stadium. We hope you enjoy!

reviews.review_description: Thank you for the support
